summary: Very popular with undergraduates because of walkability, restaurants, and proximity to campus life.
transit: Brown/Purple/Red Line nearby plus multiple bus routes.

summary: Strong mix of graduate and undergraduate interest, with nightlife, apartments, and transit access.
transit: Blue Line access and major east-west bus routes.

summary: Appeals to students seeking a quieter residential feel with comparatively moderate rent.
transit: Blue Line nearby plus Belmont and Milwaukee bus corridors.

summary: High convenience and central access, especially attractive to graduate students.
transit: All major CTA rail lines connect through the Loop.

summary: Popular for lake access, lively commercial streets, and a strong student social scene.
transit: Red/Brown/Purple Line access and lakefront bus routes.

summary: Urban, central, and convenient, but among the higher-rent options.
transit: Red Line plus dense CTA bus coverage.

summary: A calmer neighborhood with local shops, useful for students who want balance over nightlife.
transit: Brown Line service and multiple north side bus routes.

summary: Popular for renters seeking transit access and somewhat lower average rent.
transit: Red Line and express bus access along the lakefront.
